历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7775 → 10146 → 9207 → 9429 → 8796, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend, with a baseline of about 8796 in 2025; in the recent two years (2024–2025), the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 8796 and 9429, indicating overall stability; the university's enrollment plan in Gansu for Physics Category: 36 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 29 in 2024, 33 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 47 students, a significant expansion of about 42% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science Main List has been rising (81st in 2021 → 72nd in 2026), with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing overall strength and recognition; its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated as 'average'), with medium to low exposure on short video platforms, showing no abnormal surge in application attention; Materials Science and Engineering is rated A-level (top 10% nationally) in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class discipline, and featured majors like Fashion Design and Engineering and Textile Engineering hold industry-leading positions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, aligning well with Donghua University's enrollment majors, strongly attracting science students; the total number of examinees in Gansu in 2026 is approximately 218,700, with an estimated 147,600 in Physics Category based on historical proportions, an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with obvious locational advantages, strongly attracting cross-province applicants; the university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), a normal proportion for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+42%) alleviating competition, the increase in Gansu Physics Category examinees by about 21.5% intensifying competition, and the university's rising ranking enhancing attractiveness, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee growth effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10835, with a range of 10335–11335.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Electronic Information (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics (Financial Statistics and Risk Management)) (Intelligent Science Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, E-commerce, Supply Chain Management)
- Physics (Applied Physics (Integrated Circuits and New Energy), Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Materials (Polymer Materials and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering) (Double First-Class Discipline)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Textile (Textile Engineering (including Intelligent Textiles and Design), Nonwoven Materials and Engineering) (Double First-Class Discipline)
- Fashion Design and Engineering (Double First-Class Discipline)
- Chemistry (Light Chemical Engineering (Excellent Class), Applied Chemistry)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering (Excellent Class), Environmental Science)
- Bioengineering (Biomedical Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10335–11335, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10335), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 11335), you should use Tier 3 featured majors as safety options while also striving for moderate Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2024 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category dropped from approximately 2010 to 1709, with a baseline of about 1709 in 2025. The ranking has moved forward by about 301 positions in the past two years, indicating an intensifying competition. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Gansu Province: 7 students in 2024, 6 students in 2025, and 12 students in 2026, a significant expansion of 100% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been steadily rising (from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026), with continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing its comprehensive strength and recognition. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (rated as 'average'), with moderate to low exposure on short video platforms. Materials Science and Engineering is rated A-level in the fifth round of discipline evaluation; Textile Science and Engineering is a Double First-Class discipline, and Fashion Design and Engineering and other specialized majors hold a leading position in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as the Economic Management Experimental Class and Economics and Trade Class have mixed social popularity, while Journalism and Communication Class is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, with an estimated 71,100 in the History Category based on historical proportions, an increase of about 21.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city with obvious regional advantages, strongly attracting cross-province students. Its enrollment proportion in the History Category in Gansu Province is very small, which is a normal proportion for cross-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the doubling of the 2026 enrollment plan (+100%) which greatly alleviates competition, the increase of about 21.8% in History Category examinees in Gansu Province which intensifies competition, and the continuous rise in the university's ranking which enhances its appeal, the expansion effect far outweighs the examinee growth effect. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2634, with a range of 2160 to 3108.
